Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
  • Class
    Description
    Mcp
    Static façade over McpDispatcher for embedders that want a single-line dispatch call.
    McpCursor
    Pagination strategy for MCP list dispatchers (tools / prompts / resources).
    McpDispatcher
    Transport-agnostic JSON-RPC dispatcher for the MCP wire protocol.
    McpEndpoint
    Mixin interface that exposes an MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /mcp on any Juneau REST resource.
    McpPage<T>
    Slice of MCP descriptors returned by McpCursor.page(List, String, org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.BeanStore).
    McpPromptHandler
    Handler for a single MCP prompt.
    McpResourceHandler
    Handler for a single MCP resource.
    McpRestServlet
    Drop-in BasicRestServlet subclass that exposes a single MCP JSON-RPC endpoint at POST /.
    McpServerConfig
    Aggregate configuration consumed by McpDispatcher.
    McpToolHandler
    Handler for a single MCP tool.
    McpTypedHandlers
    Adapters that convert McpTypedToolHandler / McpTypedPromptHandler into the raw McpToolHandler / McpPromptHandler interfaces consumed by McpDispatcher.
    McpTypedPromptHandler<A>
    Typed variant of McpPromptHandler where MCP prompts/get arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
    McpTypedToolHandler<A,R>
    Typed variant of McpToolHandler where MCP tools/call arguments bind into a Juneau bean.
